Package com.marswars.proxy_server

Class PieceDetectionPacket.PieceDetectionData

java.lang.Object
com.marswars.proxy_server.PieceDetectionPacket.PieceDetectionData
Enclosing class:
PieceDetectionPacket
public static class PieceDetectionPacket.PieceDetectionData extends Object
Data structure containing game piece detection information.

    final ArrayList<PieceDetectionPacket.PieceDetectionData>

    final int

    Number of detections in this packet

    Index of this detection in the sequence
    final double
    thetaX
    Horizontal angle to the detected piece (radians)
    final double

    Vertical angle to the detected piece (radians)
    final Packet.Timestamp
    timestamp
    Timestamp when the detection was made
